title: Flintronic Gift Bag, 25 PCS Slash Style Paper Bag Party Bags with Cute Stickers Thank You & Donut Party Bags for Kids Party, Celebration, Birthday, Halloween, Christmas-(9X5.5X18CM-Mini Gift Bag)
features: 💖【 PREMIUM & DURABLE】 The paper bag is made of high-quality kraft paper, which is light and durable, easy to open and fold, easy to carry, and can easily carry at least 5.5 pounds of weight. The bottom of the box bag is flat, so it can stand well.

💛【CUTE STICKERS】 These stickers are sticky and different kinds, which can help to use and distinguish various items. The unique "Think you" stickers make the gift package unique and add fun, making people feel that they are carefully prepared and making the gift more precious.

🎁【Proper Size】Each set is equipped with 25 craft paper party bags, which can easily meet the needs of the party. The bag size is mini 9×5.5×18 cm (3.5×2.2×7.1 inches), with spacious space, which can easily hold a large number of candies, toys and other small gifts. It is a reliable choice for various party occasions and meets all your party needs.

💜【DIY DESIGN】These paper bags are perfect for craft and DIY. They can be painted, printed and embellished as you may wish. Personalize the bags to make them uniquely yours. Print your own business logo and use them as retail carry bags.

💙【MULTI-USE】Suitable for placing small items, such as snacks, candy, biscuits, chocolate, mint, etc. It can be applied to graduation party, Easter, birthday party, summer party, wedding ceremony, etc. Flintronic paper bags should be your FRIST choice.
description: Flintronic party gift bags will make your gifts beautiful, and add more color to your party, creating a happy atmosphere. Features: Foldable Design -- Save your storage space or unfold to maximize bag space. Creative DIY -- Personalized design, that can be painted, printed and decorated as you like. Cute Stickers -- Not only to ensure that the gift will not fall out of it but also to add fun. Strong and Durable -- Not easy to tear, achieve the perfect combination of practicality and exquisiteness. Specification: -Size:18*9*5.5cm -Weight: 180g -Material: Kraft Paper Package: Paper Bags*25 Thank You Stickers*4 Service: We are committed to bringing supreme service to our customers, if you have any questions, please feel free to contact us, We will serve you wholeheartedly. Notes: Paper bag is hand-made, there may be glue sticking to the paper bag, please be careful when opening it.
